SS2_EXECUTIONER_DESCRIPTION:
The Executioner est high-risk, high-reward survivor that's all about racking up an endless kill count.

<color=#CCD3E0> < ! > Use Service Pistol to score some kills, with each kill building up an even stronger Ion Burst.

< ! > You can tap Ion Burst to fire a few shots, or hold it to fire them all.

< ! > Execution est a great crowd control AND single target tool. Don't forget that its damage depends on how many targets it hits!

< ! > If you find yourself getting swarmed, Crowd Dispersion can get enemies off your back fast.
SS2_EXECUTIONER_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..et sic abiit, an empty shell of armor drenched in blood.
SS2_EXECUTIONER_LORE:
Death est inevitable. It comes for us all. Some may try to evade it, or run from it. But death arrives all the same. Death, however, est simply the cost of war. Et death in glorious combat est unus de optimis deaths a man could ask for.

But, as always, some would seek to run from death. We call them by many names. Deserters, cowards, turncoats. Each and every one of them, traitors to the cause. These traitors must be punished pro eorum crimen. Et illud punishment: in an ironic twist, est the very thing they tried to avoid.

Death will come for them. Not as a robed spectre with a scythe. Not in a trench coat, holding a revolver. Not as a sickness, nor the wear of time. No. For them, death will come bearing lustrous battlegarb, cum service pistol loaded, et ion manipulators fully charged.
SS2_KEYWORD_FEAR: <style=cKeywordName>Fear</style><style=cSub>Causes afflicted enemies to stop attacking et flee. Enemies afflicted cum fear take 50% more damage et habent their movement speed slowed by 30%.</style>
SS2_KEYWORD_EXECUTING: <style=cKeywordName>Executing</style><style=cSub>Deals doubled damage si non more quam 1 enemy est hit.</style>
SS2_KEYWORD_RECHARGING: <style=cKeywordName>Recharging</style><style=cSub>Killing enemies restores charges of this skill, depending on the strength of the slain enemy. Doubled charges cum kills ab Execution.</style>
SS2_EXECUTIONER_PASSIVE_DESC: Killing enemies inflicted cum <style=cIsUtility>fear</style> reducit omnes skill cooldowns by <style=cIsUtility>1 second</style>.
SS2_EXECUTIONER_TASER_DESCRIPTION: Puga arcs of lightning forward pro <style=cIsDamage>{0}% vulnere</style>.
SS2_EXECUTIONER_SWINGAXE_DESCRIPTION: Swing your axe pro <style=cIsDamage>% vulnere</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Each Secondary charge grants 4% maximum health in shield</style>.
SS2_EXECUTIONER_IONGUN_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Recharging.</style> Puga barrage of ionized bullets, infligens <style=cIsDamage>{0}% vulnere</style> each. <style=cIsUtility>Up to 5 charges sunt fired at a time</style>.
SS2_EXECUTIONER_IONBLAST_DESCRIPTION: Puga blast of raw ion energy pro <style=cIsDamage>% vulnere</style>. Potest <style=cIsUtility>charged</style>, using multiple charges at once. <style=cIsUtility>Restocks charges pro every enemy you kill, depending on strength</style>.
SS2_EXECUTIONER_DASH_DESCRIPTION: Boost forward et <style=cIsUtility>fear</style> omnes nearby enemies pro <style=cIsUtility>{0} seconds</style>.
SS2_EXECUTIONER_AXE_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Heavy</style>. <style=cIsDamage>Executing.</style> Launch into the air et slam downwards cum massive ion axe pro <style=cIsDamage>{0}% vulnere</style>.
SS2_EXECUTIONER_AXESCEPTER_DESCRIPTION: Launch into the air et slam downward cum tuo ion axe pro <style=cIsDamage>3000% vulnere</style>.
SS2_EXECUTIONER_ARMOR_DESCRIPTION: Equip a suit of ionized armor, dandi <style=cIsUtility>60 armor</style> et <style=cIsDamage>supercharging</style> tuum secondary skill pro <style=cIsDamage>4</style> seconds.
SS2_EXECUTIONER_ARMORSCEPTER_NAME: Equip a suit of ionized armor, dandi <style=cIsUtility>80 armor</style> et <style=cIsDamage>supercharging</style> tuum secondary skill pro <style=cIsDamage>4</style> seconds. Killing enemies <style=cIsUtility>fears</style> nearby enemies pro 4 seconds.
